title: plectritis ciliosa subsp. insignis
intro: Plectritis ciliosa subsp. insignis, also known as California blue-cups, is a perennial herb native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Plectritis ciliosa subsp. insignis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
